---
name: Initiative task
about: A task related to the Bezalel model, playbooks, or documentation (not a continuation project proposal)
title: ""
labels: initiative-task

## What needs to change

Describe the task: a doc to correct, a playbook to add, a process gap to fix.

## Why

What prompted this — a real experience, an inconsistency in the docs, a gap found while onboarding someone?

## Where

Which file(s) or section(s) of the repo does this affect?

## Anything else

Context, related issues, or open questions.
